reasoning: The base rate for 'Riots' in Canada is very low; the 30-day average over a year is approximately 1.9 (yielding the reference value 2.917). Currently, in October 2025, there are no reports of widespread rioting in Canada, even amidst some anti-Trump and post-election protests. The first resolution period (ending Nov 2) is nearly complete without any major spike in violent events. Without an existing massive country-wide crisis, reaching a 15-fold increase in riots in a single month is extremely improbable for Canada. Therefore, probabilities are kept very low but marginally increasing for later dates due to time horizon uncertainty.
